query: SELECT tl.token, l.nome FROM tokens_loja tl JOIN lojas l ON tl.lojaId = l.id WHERE l.nome LIKE '%Braga%' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT tl.token, l.nome FROM tokens_loja tl JOIN lojas l ON tl.lojaId = l.id WHERE l.nome LIKE '%Braga%' LIMIT 1;
